creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
The 'aiostream' needs a dependency called `async_exit_stack` and that is compatible only with Python 3.5/3.6.

https://github.com/sorcio/async_exit_stack/blob/master/setup.py

I will port it anyway to see if it works with Python 3.7+ otherwise there is nothing I can do to fix it other than revert to an earlier version.

Thank you.
